zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybill de Hoghton於1345年1月9日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布利黑頓時，她的父親Adam de Hoghton36歲，母親Ellen Venables34歲。她和Lord William De Banastre I至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1424年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybill de Hoghton于1345年1月9日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾布利黑頓时，她的父亲Adam de Hoghton36岁，母亲Ellen Venables34岁。她和Lord William De Banastre I至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1424年在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hoghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Houghton
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Sybill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybill de Hoghton was born on 9 January 1345, in Bretherton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam de Hoghton, was 36 and her mother, Ellen Venables, was 34. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Lord William De Banastre I. She died in 1424, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybill de Hoghton est née le 9 janvier 1345, à Bretherton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Hoghton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ellen Venables, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Lord William De Banastre I. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybill de Hoghton am 9. Januar 1345 in Bretherton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Hoghton 36 und ihre Mutter Ellen Venables 34. Sie hatte mit Lord William De Banastre I mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybill de Hoghton è nata il il 9 gennaio 1345 nel Bretherton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Adam de Hoghton, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ellen Venables, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Lord William De Banastre I. Morì nel 1424, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybill de Hoghtonが1345年1月9日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブレスエルトンで生まれた時，父Adam de Hoghtonは36歳，母Ellen Venablesは34歳であった。彼女はLord William De Banastre Iとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybill de Hoghton(이)가 1345년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 브레더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Hoghton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Venables(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Lord William De Banastre I(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybill de Hoghton nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1345, em Bretherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam de Hoghton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Venables, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Lord William De Banastre I. Ela faleceu em 1424, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybill de Hoghton родилась 9 января 1345 г. в местности бретиртон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam de Hoghton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Venables, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Lord William De Banastre I. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybill de Hoghton nació el 9 de enero de 1345, en Bretherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam de Hoghton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ellen Venables, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Lord William De Banastre I. Murió en 1424, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
